case_title: CARLOS CHACON VS. HECTOR CORNEJO CUSIHUAMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CHACON, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHACON, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CROSS-COMPLAINT. CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS-COMPLAINT MUST SERVE CROSS-DEFENDANT, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CROSS-COMPLAINT. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS-COMPLAINT MUST SERVE CROSS-DEFENDANT, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MAURICIO CASTRO
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT TO JAN-16-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT TO JAN-16-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF WITNESS MAURICIO CASTRO *FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST* FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHACON, CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BRAD KAPLAN. FILED BY CHACON, CARLOS CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHACON, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CHACON, CARLOS TO THE EXTENT THAT THE GUITAR IN ISSUE IN THIS CASE IS IN THE POSSESSION OF THE POLICE AND THEY HAVE NO CRIMINAL NEED FOR ITS RETENTION, THE GUITAR SHALL BE TURNED OVER TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT CUSIHUAMAN, HECTOR CORNEJO ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CHACON, CARLOS
